flashcards.definition: Excess nutrient enrichment (N, P) → algal blooms → decomposition depletes oxygen → dead zones.
Amount of O₂ needed by microorganisms to decompose organic matter; high BOD = polluted water.
Area of very low dissolved oxygen (hypoxia) where most aquatic life cannot survive.
Disease-causing organism (bacteria, viruses, parasites) in contaminated water.
Buildup of a persistent chemical in an organism's body over time (e.g., mercury in fish).
